---
title: "Dự đoán nguy cơ mắc bệnh tim dựa trên dữ liệu y tế bằng các mô hình Machine Learning."
date: "2026-06-11"
output: html_document
---


```{r Thư viện cần thiết, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Các thư viện
library(caret)
library(e1071)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)

set.seed(123)

```

``` {r}
# 1. Đọc và xử lý dữ liệu
data <- read.csv(file.path("heart_disease_dataset_clean.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

cat_vars <- c("sex","cp","fbs","restecg","exang","slope","ca","thal","target")
data[cat_vars] <- lapply(data[cat_vars], factor)
data$target <- factor(data$target, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No","Yes"))
```

``` {r}
# 2. Tạo train/test
idx <- createDataPartition(data$target, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
train <- data[idx, ]
test  <- data[-idx, ]

ctrl <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 10,
                      classProbs = TRUE, summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)
```

``` {r Các mô hình Machine Learning}
# 3. Logistic Regression
log_model <- glm(target ~ ., data = train, family = binomial)
summary(log_model)

log_prob <- predict(log_model, test, type = "response")
log_pred <- factor(ifelse(log_prob > 0.5, "Yes", "No"), levels = c("No","Yes"))
log_cm <- confusionMatrix(log_pred, test$target, positive = "Yes")
print(log_cm)

# 4. KNN - chọn k tối ưu
knn_model <- train(target ~ ., data = train, method = "knn",
                    trControl = ctrl, metric = "ROC",
                    preProcess = c("center","scale"),
                    tuneGrid = expand.grid(k = 1:17))
print(knn_model)
best_k <- knn_model$bestTune$k
cat("K tối ưu:", best_k, "\n")
plot(knn_model)

knn_pred <- predict(knn_model, test)
knn_prob <- predict(knn_model, test, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]
knn_cm <- confusionMatrix(knn_pred, test$target, positive = "Yes")
print(knn_cm)

# 5. SVM
svm_tune <- train(target ~ ., data = train, method = "svmRadial",
                   trControl = ctrl, metric = "ROC",
                   preProcess = c("center","scale"),
                   tuneLength = 10)
print(svm_tune)
plot(svm_tune)

svm_pred <- predict(svm_tune, test)
svm_prob <- predict(svm_tune, test, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]
svm_cm <- confusionMatrix(svm_pred, test$target, positive = "Yes")
print(svm_cm)

# 6. So sánh chỉ số
get_metrics <- function(cm, model_name) {
  data.frame(
    Model = model_name,
    Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
    Sensitivity = cm$byClass["Sensitivity"],
    Specificity = cm$byClass["Specificity"],
    Precision = cm$byClass["Precision"],
    F1 = cm$byClass["F1"]
  )
}

results <- rbind(
  get_metrics(log_cm, "Logistic Regression"),
  get_metrics(knn_cm, paste0("KNN (k=", best_k, ")")),
  get_metrics(svm_cm, "SVM")
)
print(results)

results_melt <- melt(results, id.vars = "Model")
ggplot(results_melt, aes(x = Model, y = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "So sánh chỉ số các mô hình", y = "Giá trị", fill = "Chỉ số") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, hjust = 1))

# 7. ROC - AUC
roc_log <- roc(test$target, log_prob, levels = c("No","Yes"))
roc_knn <- roc(test$target, knn_prob, levels = c("No","Yes"))
roc_svm <- roc(test$target, svm_prob, levels = c("No","Yes"))

plot(roc_log, col = "blue", main = "ROC Curve - So sánh 3 mô hình")
plot(roc_knn, col = "darkgreen", add = TRUE)
plot(roc_svm, col = "red", add = TRUE)
legend("bottomright",
       legend = c(paste0("Logistic (AUC=", round(auc(roc_log),3), ")"),
                  paste0("KNN (AUC=", round(auc(roc_knn),3), ")"),
                  paste0("SVM (AUC=", round(auc(roc_svm),3), ")")),
       col = c("blue","darkgreen","red"), lwd = 2)

# 8. Confusion Matrix Heatmap
plot_cm <- function(cm, title) {
  cm_df <- as.data.frame(cm$table)
  ggplot(cm_df, aes(Prediction, Reference, fill = Freq)) +
    geom_tile() +
    geom_text(aes(label = Freq), color = "white", size = 6) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightblue", high = "darkblue") +
    labs(title = title) +
    theme_minimal()
}

plot_cm(log_cm, "Confusion Matrix - Logistic Regression")
plot_cm(knn_cm, "Confusion Matrix - KNN")
plot_cm(svm_cm, "Confusion Matrix - SVM")

# 9. Dự đoán cho dữ liệu mới
new_patient <- data.frame(
  age = 50, sex = 1, cp = 2, trestbps = 120, chol = 200,
  fbs = 0, restecg = 1, thalach = 165, exang = 0,
  oldpeak = 0.5, slope = 2, ca = 0, thal = 2
)

for (v in cat_vars[cat_vars != "target"]) {
  new_patient[[v]] <- factor(new_patient[[v]], levels = levels(train[[v]]))
}

log_new_prob <- predict(log_model, new_patient, type = "response")
log_new_pred <- ifelse(log_new_prob > 0.5, "Có nguy cơ", "Không nguy cơ")

knn_new_pred <- predict(knn_model, new_patient)
knn_new_prob <- predict(knn_model, new_patient, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]

svm_new_pred <- predict(svm_tune, new_patient)
svm_new_prob <- predict(svm_tune, new_patient, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]

cat("===== KẾT QUẢ DỰ ĐOÁN DỮ LIỆU MỚI =====\n")
cat(sprintf("Logistic Regression: %s (xác suất = %.3f)\n", log_new_pred, log_new_prob))
cat(sprintf("KNN (k=%d): %s (xác suất = %.3f)\n", best_k,
            ifelse(knn_new_pred == "Yes", "Có nguy cơ", "Không nguy cơ"), knn_new_prob))
cat(sprintf("SVM: %s (xác suất = %.3f)\n",
            ifelse(svm_new_pred == "Yes", "Có nguy cơ", "Không nguy cơ"), svm_new_prob))

```
